Before Messi & Ronaldo, there was King George.

George Weah at AC Milan wasn't just good, he was a force of nature. Power, pace, skill – he had it all. 1995 Ballon d'Or winner, the ONLY African to achieve it. Remember that goal vs Verona? Ran the length of the pitch. An absolute legend who paved the way. Underrated.
